subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined by the effulgent rays of guidance from the Supreme Kingdom! That which thou hadst written was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستشرق انوار هدی از ملکوت اعلی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید نفحاتی
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
